title: did betzalel in the image of God construct the flesh or body of god?Circa Genesis, first the body is formed, then the spirit is breathed into it. Circa Ezekiel first the body is formed? then the spirit is breathed into it?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - his name means in the image of God he made the form in the image of God he constructed the body of God according to the word...
content: - his name means in the image of God he made the form in the image of God he constructed the body of God according to the word...
